mapper.select: /* SQL ID : MutEvalQstnDAO.listMutEvalQstn 설 명 : 평가 문제 목록 조회 */ SELECT A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID AS evalCd , A.QSTN_ID AS qstnCd , A.MTL_EVL_TYCD AS evalTypeCd , A.UP_MTL_EVL_QSTN_ID AS parQstnCd , A.QSTN_SEQNO AS qstnNo , A.QSTN_CTS AS qstnCts , A.EVL_SCR AS evalScore , A.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM AS regDttm , A.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , A.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm FROM MTL_EVL_QSTN AS A WHERE A.ASMT_MTL_EVL_RSLT_ID = #{evalCd} AND A.MTL_EVL_TYCD = #{evalTypeCd}
